title: Testing Strategies
subtitle: TestBed, component testing, HTTP mocking, marble testing, and E2E
description: Angular's testing toolkit is comprehensive but often misunderstood. Master TestBed configuration, component testing with DebugElement, mocking HTTP with HttpTestingController, testing observables with marble testing, and E2E testing with Playwright or Cypress.
learningOutcomes: Configure TestBed for component and service testing
Query and interact with the DOM using DebugElement and fixture
Mock services and verify interactions in isolation
Use HttpClientTestingModule and HttpTestingController for HTTP tests
Test observables with fakeAsync, tick, and marble testing
Test route guards and navigation in isolation
Write E2E tests that reflect user workflows
